title: Sonoran Stew
description: A hearty stew from the Sonoran Desert region, perfect for a cold winter day.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the stew meat and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced avocado, chopped tomato, and minced garlic. Cook for 2 minutes.
Add 1 cup of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 hour or until the meat is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
Serve hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
